title: Pharaoh checklists frontmatter block
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter block (delimited by ---) at the top of any .pharaoh/project/checklists/*.md file. If no frontmatter block is present the validator receives an empty object, which is valid (frontmatter is optional).

applies_to.description: Artefact-type key this checklist targets, or '*' for any type.

axes.description: Ordered list of quality-axis labels covered by this checklist.
